Metadata.title: Joker Clash
Metadata.description: Play Joker online with friends in real-time.

fairPlay.title: Fair Play First
fairPlay.text: Every round is designed around clear rules, balanced gameplay, and transparent scoring.

fastMatches.title: Fast, Smooth Matches
fastMatches.text: From room creation to final score, we focus on responsive and low-friction gameplay.

communityDriven.title: Community Driven
communityDriven.text: Joker is built around players. Feedback directly shapes features, balancing, and quality-of-life updates.

features.classicMechanics: Classic trick-taking mechanics with Joker twists
features.responsiveExperience: Responsive experience for desktop and mobile
features.soundAndAnimations: Sound, animations, and in-game UI controls

hero.title: Built for players who love strategy, speed, and card game mastery.
hero.paragraph: Joker is an online multiplayer card experience where every hand matters. We combine classic card table energy with modern real-time gameplay.

sectionOne.title: Who We Are
sectionOne.paragraph: We are a small team focused on delivering a polished and competitive card game platform. Our goal is simple: make every match fair, engaging, and fun to replay.

sectionFour.title: Trust & Transparency
sectionFour.paragraph: We are committed to clear policies and player safety. You can review our platform details at any time.

cta.title: Ready to Play?
cta.paragraph: Join a room, challenge friends, and climb with smart play.

DataDeletionPage.title: Delete your data
DataDeletionPage.lead: Follow these steps to remove Joker Clash from your account. This stops login and removes the app's access to your data.

stepTwo.normal: to see all apps currently connected to your account.

stepThree.normal: in the list and click the
stepThree.normalTwo: button to disconnect and delete the app's access.

stepOne.strong: Log in to your Google account

stepTwo.emThree: Apps with access to your account

stepOne.strong: Log in to your Joker Clash account

stepThree.normal: Follow the on-screen confirmation to permanently remove your account and data.

optional.text: Prefer us to remove your account manually?
optional.textTwo: and use the Delete Account modal, or email

DataDeletionPage.note: Notes: Make sure your Facebook/Google app settings and redirect URIs are correct, and that your app is live or you are listed as an app admin/tester if testing in development mode.
DataDeletionPage.noteTwo: Notes: Make sure your Facebook app is live or you are listed as an app admin/tester in the Facebook Developers dashboard if you run into permissions or scope errors when using Facebook Login.

FeedbackPage.title: Send Feedback
FeedbackPage.subtitle: Found a bug or want a feature? Tell us what happened and how you'd like it to work.

cardTwo.title: Why your feedback helps
cardTwo.paragraph: We review reports regularly and triage bug fixes and feature work based on impact.

PrivacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPage.intro: Welcome to Joker Clash. We value your privacy as much as a hidden ace up your sleeve. This policy explains how information is collected, used, and protected when you use our service.

sectionOne.title: Information We Collect
sectionOne.paragraph: To keep the leaderboard running and the cards dealing, we collect:

liTwo.normal: wins, losses, in-game currency, and deck preferences.

liThree.normal: IP address, browser type, and device information.

sectionTwo.title: How We Use Your Information
sectionTwo.paragraph: We do not sell personal data. Information is used to:

ul.liTwo: Improve game balance and fix bugs.
ul.liThree: Send important updates (new features, maintenance notices).
ul.liFour: Prevent cheating and keep gameplay fair.

sectionThree.title: Third-Party Services
sectionThree.paragraph: We may use third-party providers to support the platform:

liOne.normal: to understand usage and improve performance.

liTwo.normal: partners may use cookies for relevant content (if ads are shown).

liThree.normal: secure processors (e.g., Stripe/PayPal). Full card details are not stored by us.

sectionFour.title: Children's Privacy
sectionFour.paragraph: Our service is intended for players aged 13+. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children under this age. If such data is discovered, it is deleted promptly.

liOne.normal: edit profile information in account settings.

liTwo.normal: request account/data deletion by contacting support.

liThree.normal: disable cookies in browser settings (some features may not work properly).

sectionSix.title: Security
sectionSix.paragraph: We use industry-standard safeguards to protect data. No method is fully secure, but reasonable measures are continuously applied.

sectionSeven.title: Data Retention & Deletion
sectionSeven.paragraph: We retain account and gameplay data to provide the Service, prevent abuse, and comply with legal requirements. You can remove third-party access or request deletion using the instructions below.

liOne.normal: Log in to Facebook and open

liTwo.em: Security > Third-party apps with account access

liOne.normal: Log in to your Joker Clash account on the website.

liThree.normal: Follow the confirmation steps to permanently remove your account and data.

paragraphTwo.text: You may also visit our dedicated data deletion page at
paragraphTwo.textTwo: for step-by-step guidance, or contact us at

sectionEight.title: Contact Us
sectionEight.paragraph: Questions about this policy or your data can be sent to:

hero.title: Joker — Official Rules
hero.paragraph: Concise guide for Classic Joker and Nines Joker.

ol.liSix: Round score = sum of hand points.

ul.liOne: There are 2 Jokers in the deck.
ul.liTwo: Joker is the strongest/special control card.

liThree.text: If played first in trick, player can request:

ul.liFour: If played later in trick, Joker can force win or avoid over-winning.
ul.liFive: A later Joker can override an earlier Joker.
ul.liSix: If player requests to win and someone has no requested suit, trump can be used and may beat the request.
ul.liSeven: If player requests to lose and request cannot be satisfied, player may still take the trick.

sectionFour.title: Scoring (Per Hand)
sectionFour.subtitleTwo: Case B — Hand number = bid = win
sectionFour.paragraphFour: Penalty is selected by room creator:

paragraph.text: If bot finishes 1st or 2nd, that slot becomes

ulTwo.liOne: To join, user must have at least the bet amount.

sectionOne.title: Acceptance of Terms
sectionOne.paragraph: By accessing or using Joker Clash, users agree to these Terms of Service and any applicable laws and regulations.

sectionTwo.title: Eligibility
sectionTwo.paragraph: Users must be at least 13 years old, or the age required by local law. If under the required age, parental or guardian consent is required.

sectionThree.title: Accounts and Security
sectionThree.paragraph: Users are responsible for account activity and for maintaining confidentiality of login credentials. Unauthorized use must be reported immediately.

ul.liOne: Cheat, exploit bugs, or manipulate gameplay unfairly.
ul.liTwo: Harass, abuse, threaten, or impersonate others.
ul.liThree: Attempt unauthorized access to systems or user accounts.
ul.liFour: Upload malicious code or interfere with service stability.

sectionFive.title: User Content
sectionFive.paragraph: Users are responsible for content they submit (e.g., chat, profile text, reports). Content that violates law or these Terms may be removed.

sectionSix.title: Virtual Items and In-Game Currency
sectionSix.paragraph: Virtual items/currency (if any) are licensed, not sold, and have no real-world monetary value unless explicitly stated.

sectionSeven.title: Intellectual Property
sectionSeven.paragraph: All trademarks, logos, graphics, code, and game content are owned by JOKERCLASH or licensors and are protected by applicable laws.

sectionEight.title: Suspension and Termination
sectionEight.paragraph: Access may be suspended or terminated for violations of these Terms, abuse, fraud, or actions that harm service integrity.

sectionNine.title: Disclaimers
sectionNine.paragraph: The Service is provided 'as is' and 'as available' without warranties of any kind, to the fullest extent allowed by law.

sectionTen.title: Limitation of Liability
sectionTen.paragraph: To the fullest extent permitted by law, Joker Clash is not liable for indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages.

sectionEleven.title: Governing Law
sectionEleven.paragraph: These Terms are governed by the laws of Georgia, without regard to conflict of law principles.

sectionTwelve.title: Changes to Terms
sectionTwelve.paragraph: Terms may be updated from time to time. Continued use of the Service after updates means acceptance of the revised Terms.
